content.en:
"Palm Heaven Supreme Venerable Senior, after you are born, are you sure that you will impact the Ultimate Supreme Venerable Realm?"

Guantian Jizun asked.

Palm Heaven Jizun was silent for a long time, and finally said: "I am only thirty percent sure, and if I fail to break through this time, even with the help of this treasure, I still have no certainty of survival." Therefore, I hope to cultivate you, and if you break through to the ultimate supreme in the future, maybe you can help me break through to the ultimate supreme. "

Saying this, Guan ~ Tianji Zun was very excited.

"Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable Senior, I will strive to become an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord first!" said Guantian Extreme Venerable, but deep down in his heart, he was fantasizing about becoming the Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

After all, it had always been his dream to become the Ultimate Extremity, and if he did, he would never be constrained in any way again, nor would he be in any danger.

That's the real freedom!

Soon.

Guantian Jizun and Zhangtian Jizun discussed the matter of Wanfa Jizun Ye Tian.

"Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, that Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable didn't break through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, so how did it come out of the Ultimate Land?" asked the Guantian Extreme Venerable curiously.

"I don't know. Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable said: "Maybe it came out of some special circumstances, or maybe it was a special treasure that escaped from the ultimate place like me. There is also a possibility, that is, the Ultimate Supreme Venerable helped him out. But the Ultimate Extreme Venerable couldn't look down on the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord at all, let alone those creatures who weren't even an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord. I suspect that the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable possessed some kind of special treasure that allowed him to come out of the Ultimate Land. "

"Special Treasure !!"

Guantian Jizun's heart was moved, he had heard the legend of the Wanfa Jizun, and his growth rate was not inferior to him, even faster than him, and he was able to cultivate so fast by relying on the Zhangtian Jizun, if Ye Tian's treasure was obtained by him, wouldn't he have more hope of becoming the ultimate Jizun?

At this moment, he even had the idea of killing the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable.

Of course, he also knew very well that with his current strength, there was a high probability that he would not be able to defeat the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, and it was very likely that the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable was already an ancient-level Ultimate Realm Master, and there might be a small probability of breaking through to the Eternal Ultimate Realm Master.

"Palm Heaven Supreme Venerable Senior, if you are born, are you sure to kill the Ten Thousand Law Supreme Venerable?"

Guantian Jizun asked.

Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable understood the thoughts of the Heavenly Peer Venerable, "Heavenly Peer Venerable, are you trying to snatch the treasures that may exist on the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable?"

"Yes!"

The Heaven Watching Extreme Venerable nodded.

Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable smiled and said, "I was invincible in the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, even if the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable broke through to the Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord, I would still be sure to kill him!"

"That's great!"

Guantian Jizun said excitedly.

Next, the Guantian Supreme Venerable quietly waited for the Heavenly Supreme Venerable to get rid of the restrictions of heaven and earth and reincarnate.

And Ye Tian didn't know that he was being targeted by the Guantian Extreme Venerable, maybe he didn't care!

With his current strength, he is not mainly the ultimate supreme attack, he is not afraid of anyone at all.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian began to repair the multi-dimensional territory, constantly opening up and expanding the territory of the human race, making the territory of the human race vast and solid.

He even integrated many special celestial bodies from the Sea of Dimensions into the Terran realm.

this day.

At this time, the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable was no longer here, and the ultimate creature inside the main body of the Abyss Star had already been affected and fallen in a war.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian made a move and grabbed this Abyssal Star Subject, this huge Abyssal Star Body, the Tyrant-level Ultimate Realm Lord couldn't move it, but in Ye Tian's hand, it was like an ordinary glass ball, and he took it away at will.

Wow!

The main body of Yuanxing was taken away by Ye Tian, and then returned to the Terran territory.

It didn't take a while.

Ye Tian returned to the Terran Territory of the Multidimensional Territory, and then put the main body of the Abyssal Star in a suitable place, and sealed the main body of the Abyssal Star, thereby reducing the suppression of the human race by the main body of the Abyssal Star.

Otherwise, under the suppression of special celestial bodies such as the main body of the Abyssal Star, many human beings will be constantly unable to get close, and even if they are not far away, they will be suppressed to the point that their bodies will be shattered or unable to move.

Therefore, Ye Tian had to seal the power of the main body of the Abyssal Star, but it would not affect the human race's cultivation of the Abyssal Star system and absorb the power of the main body of the Abyssal Star.

After a long period of time, the territory of the human race has been many times larger, and even the multidimensional territory has expanded many times, and the heavens and the earth have become stronger, even if the ultimate realm lord is in the current multidimensional territory war, he will not shatter the multidimensional territory.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian didn't do anything, he stayed in the territory of the human race with peace of mind, and while he was contemplating and cultivating, he was guiding his relatives.

With his help, his relatives have made extremely fast progress, his wife Xiao Yue and daughter Ye Xingyue have broken through to the Hao level, and there are some treasures he brought from the Ultimate Land, as long as Ye Xingchen works hard to comprehend, there is still hope to comprehend the ultimate rules in the Sea of Dimensions, but it will be extremely difficult.

After all, even in the ultimate land, it is extremely difficult to comprehend the ultimate rules, let alone in a place like the Sea of Dimensions.

And without those chance assessments in the ultimate place, it is almost difficult for him to improve now.

However, in the Sea of Dimensions, he can now use the Copy Body ability.

Now, he was constantly copying one copy of the body after another, trying to perfect his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Path, if it weren't for this, he would have been ready to try to hit the Ultimate Supreme Realm.

After sacrificing countless replica bodies, his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao was still perfected at an extremely fast speed, at least much faster than when he perfected the Ultimate Tower.

Anyway, Ye Tian decided to perfect the ultimate path of ten thousand laws to an extremely high realm, and then impact the ultimate supreme realm.

"At the very least, we have to raise the Ultimate Dao of Ten Thousand Laws to a medium level of self-created Ultimate Dao. "

Ye Tian thought secretly.

Therefore, he is not in any hurry now, and there is no danger in the Dimensional Sea, and he is at ease.
